title: A Guide for Self-Represented Individuals — Civil Service Commission
description: Practical CSC guide for appellants representing themselves (pro se) in a G.L. c.31 civil-service appeal — every stage from filing through decision, including pre-hearing preparation, hearing conduct, cross-examination technique, exhibit redaction/bates-numbering, discovery, and an FAQ.
notes: Large file (~42 KB). DEADLINES mirror the appeals-process page: continuance target within 30 days; exhibits/participant list ≥ 2 weeks before full hearing; reconsideration 10 days; Superior Court appeal 30 days. File online at ara.anf.mass.gov.
